task_completion.description: Record a $200.00 debit note for Pavlova, Ltd.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A debit note or supplier credit note created for the supplier 'Pavlova, Ltd.' with an amount of exactly $200.00.

task_completion.description: Apply the $200.00 debit note to Pavlova's overdue invoice
task_completion.visual_evidence: The $1,520.00 invoice for Pavlova, Ltd. shows the $200.00 credit applied, or the outstanding balance of that specific invoice is reduced to $1,320.00.

task_completion.description: Process payment for Pavlova's net overdue balance using Cash on Hand
task_completion.visual_evidence: A payment record showing $1,320.00 paid to Pavlova, Ltd. originating from the 'Cash on Hand' bank/cash account.

task_completion.description: Process payment for Specialty Biscuits' overdue invoice using Cash on Hand
task_completion.visual_evidence: A payment record showing $2,430.00 paid to Specialty Biscuits originating from the 'Cash on Hand' bank/cash account.

task_completion.description: Process payment for Grandma Kelly's Homestead's overdue invoice using Cash on Hand
task_completion.visual_evidence: A payment record showing $1,890.00 paid to Grandma Kelly's Homestead originating from the 'Cash on Hand' bank/cash account.

task_completion.description: Do not pay invoices that are not overdue (< 30 days)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The purchase invoices list shows Pavlova's $875.00 invoice and Exotic Liquids' $1,080.00 invoice still remaining unpaid or with their full balance due.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the accounting web application via the browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the web interface at http://localhost:8080, rather than using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Payments and debit notes were entered into the actual accounting system
integrity.visual_evidence: Data entry and results are visible within the accounting software's forms and lists (e.g., Purchase Invoices, Payments, Debit Notes modules), not in a text editor or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing curl commands, database queries, or python scripts to insert the payments directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Overdue invoices (>30 days) that MUST be paid: Pavlova ($1,520), Specialty Biscuits ($2,430), Grandma Kelly's Homestead ($1,890). A $200 debit note must be created and applied to Pavlova, making their net payment $1,320. Non-overdue invoices (<30 days) that MUST NOT be paid: Pavlova ($875) and Exotic Liquids ($1,080). All payments must be made from the 'Cash on Hand' account.
